contracts.name: csv_has_observables
contracts.diagnostic_hint: ADC/DAC checker-visible signals must be saved.

contracts.name: input_sweep_present
contracts.diagnostic_hint: Input sweep is present; do not redesign stimulus if this passes.

contracts.name: adc_code_changes
contracts.diagnostic_hint: ADC output code is stuck or covers too few codes.

contracts.name: dac_output_moves
contracts.diagnostic_hint: DAC analog output is not responding to code changes.
